description: Create a custom role named 'Course Auditor' (shortname: 'courseauditor') for external reviewers, assignable in the 'Course' context. The role requires 'Allow' permissions for 'View course content' (moodle/course:view), 'View grades' (moodle/grade:viewall), and 'View participants' (moodle/course:viewparticipants). Assign this role to 'Dr. Martinez' (username: teacher2) in the 'Engineering Mechanics' (ENG201) course. Login as admin (username: admin, password: Admin1234!).
